title: Blood Brothers
description: Soul Link co-op challenge with shared health and shared hunger. Join friends fast with Essentials. Damage, healing, and hunger affect the whole team, so you must work together to survive. Great for friends, streams, and hardcore runs.
body:
# Blood Brothers

Blood Brothers is a **Soul Link** co-op Minecraft modpack where your team shares **health and hunger**. Connect to your friends’ worlds quickly using **Essentials** and jump straight into the challenge.

Every hit, fall, heal, and hunger tick affects the whole group, so communicattion is key. Share gear, plan fights together, beat the **Ender Dragon**. Perfect for friend groups, chaotic survival runs, and stream challenges.

**Features**
- Soul Link gameplay: shared health + shared hunger
- Easy multiplayer with Essentials
- Designed for small groups and fast starts

**Tip:** Stick together, carry extra food, and make sure everyone is geared.
